notes: Test new order (does not send to matching engine).

params.name: batchOrders
params.description: JSON array of order objects, max 5 orders

params.name: origClientOrderIdList
params.description: JSON array of client order IDs, max 10

params.name: countdownTime
params.description: Countdown time in ms. 0 to cancel timer.

params.name: leverage
params.description: target initial leverage: int from 1 to 125

params.name: fromAmount
params.description: Either fromAmount or toAmount must be sent

params.name: toAmount
params.description: Either fromAmount or toAmount must be sent

params.name: orderId
params.description: Either orderId or quoteId is required

params.name: quoteId
params.description: Either orderId or quoteId is required
